title: SEC sets September talks on move toward 24-hour stock trading
summary: Nasdaq, Cboe and the London Stock Exchange are among major exchanges moving toward longer trading hours.

title: Gemini sent $10M in Bitcoin to Trump PAC after joint motion with CFTC
summary: The Bitcoin donation can be used to support Donald Trump as a New York court considers whether to reverse a $5 million settlement between the CFTC and Gemini.

title: PHP/USD: Philippine Peso Falls to Fresh Record Low as Oil Advances
summary: The Philippine peso dropped to a new record low as oil prices climbed, putting pressure on the central bank to step up its defense of the currency.

title: Modi Seeks to Calm Anger in Rare Video as India Protests Widen
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi made a fresh bid to calm mounting anger over examination paper leaks as students prepared nationwide protests on Friday, with demands growing for the education minister to step down.

title: Black Forest Labs Unveils FLUX 3 AI: Ditches Stills for Video—And Robot Hands
summary: FLUX 3 is the German AI lab’s first video model, and the same system is already teaching robots to work an Audi assembly line.

title: Goldman Sachs CEO Breaks With Wall Street to Back Crypto Clarity Act
summary: Solomon's endorsement splits with JP Morgan's Jamie Dimon and banking trade groups, who warn the bill's stablecoin-yield provisions could pull deposits away from traditional lenders.

title: Robinhood CEO’s X account hacked to promote Vladhood memecoin flagged as ‘scam’
summary: Robinhood Chain has seen cumulative DEX volume of about $9 billion, primarily driven by higher-risk memecoins, per Entropy Advisors.

title: MoonPay now accepts Discover Network cards for crypto purchases and sales in US
summary: The addition makes Discover the third major U.S. card network supported by MoonPay, alongside Visa and Mastercard.

title: US hits 60 countries with new duties as Trump rebuilds tariff wall
summary: Administration pins measures on forced labour probe after Supreme Court struck down blanket levies
